emergency_definition: Total power loss, exposed wiring, equipment sparking or on fire, or any call from a food service business that loses power

emergency_routing_rules.action: Route to lead electrician on call
emergency_routing_rules.fallback_action: Leave a message on Tony's voicemail and send a text to James

non_emergency_routing_rules.action: Take a message or politely decline
Play standard message and request caller's name, number, and issue description

integration_constraints.notes: Not required for initial setup, to be assessed after three months

after_hours_flow_summary: Route emergency calls to lead electrician on call, non-emergency calls receive standard message
office_hours_flow_summary: Route non-emergency calls to main office
notes: Twenty percent of callers speak Spanish
Future requirement: AI handling basic Spanish
If callers ask for a quote over the phone, the AI should explain that a site assessment is required and offer to schedule one
